arts.ttl: Brighton vs Arsenal Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Where To Watch
arts.sum: A clash between two sides at opposite ends of the Premier League table sees second-placed Arsenal travel to face Brighton, who sit mid-table, on Saturday, January 4th at 17:30 UTC at the Amex Stadium....

The Seagulls haven’t tasted victory for seven games heading into this fixture, but have lost just once at home in the league, meaning we’ll have to be as red-hot as we have in recent weeks to avoid freezing on the south coast. We have won three of our last five Premier League games against Brighton, as many as we had in their first 10 against the Seagulls in the competition (D3 L4).
